meaning: n.[英史](1866年因议会改革问题而)退出自由党的议员,持不同政见派别中的一员,退出一派另行组派的人
examples: About that time Judah parted from his brothers and pitched his tent near a certain Adullamite named Hirah.
And it came to pass at that time, that Judah went down from his brethren, and turned in to a certain Adullamite, whose name was Hirah.
